action.reasoning: Observation: convnext_tiny reached test accuracy 0.7586 (best so far); noisy val acc peaked at 0.5936 around epoch 5 then declined to 0.5788 while train loss kept dropping (clear overfitting to noise). Curves confirm steady loss decrease but val plateau/decline. Analysis: saving final instead of best checkpoint suboptimal for noisy labels; AutoAugment(CIFAR10) will add regularization to combat noise better than basic flips/crops; label_smoothing+AdamW already helps; saving best on val_acc + longer training (30 epochs) with cosine scheduler will capture peak without extra cost. Decision: edit train.py for AutoAugment, best-model saving logic, 30 epochs, submit_eval on new best.pt to measure gain and update baseline.
